message:
test(core): migrate async tests to runtime_compat and add mux_client timeout coverage

Continue the runtime_compat migration (ft-e34d9) by converting the
remaining test infrastructure away from direct tokio dependencies.

native_events.rs:
- Convert all #[tokio::test] tests to explicit run_async_test() helper
  using RuntimeBuilder::current_thread() and CompatRuntime::block_on()
- Add recv_event() timeout helper for deterministic test completion
- Reorder imports for consistency with runtime_compat conventions

mux_client.rs:
- Switch from tokio::io::AsyncReadExt to runtime_compat unix adapter
- Add list_panes_read_timeout_when_server_stalls_after_handshake test
  covering the case where the server completes handshake but then stalls
  during pane listing, verifying the read timeout fires correctly
- Add list_panes_handles_partial_frame_reads test verifying correct
  reassembly when the server sends fragmented length-prefixed frames
- Update test infrastructure to use RuntimeBuilder + CompatRuntime

proptest_search_bridge.rs, proptest_snapshot.rs:
- Align import ordering and RuntimeBuilder formatting for consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
